chapter goal: How can one incidence theorem reveal projective completion, algebraic proof, and circle geometry at once?
computational checks: cross-ratio invariance under a projective reparametrization
join/meet incidence for generated homogeneous points
mode-specific conic or hyperbolic numeric check when relevant
gaps: Proof-heavy material in Chapter 1 is represented by incidence diagrams, determinant/cross-ratio checks, or small parameter experiments rather than copied text.

visual sequence.concept: Pappos incidence configuration with movable roles
visual sequence.expected_observation: The same point-line incidences remain readable after the layout changes.
visual sequence.learner_inspection_target: For Chapter 1, inspect pappos incidence configuration with movable roles by identifying which objects instantiate pappos configurations.
visual sequence.library: numpy, matplotlib, local projective/conic/Cayley-Klein helpers, and self-contained HTML
visual sequence.validation_target: dot products for incident point-line pairs vanish
